template: What is the maturity level of {capability} and which {deliverable} should be created first?
description: Query capability maturity then determine deliverable priority

template: Retrieve the current state of {system} and compute the risk score based on its technology stack age and interface count.
description: Fetch system state then compute risk

template: What is the cost-benefit ratio for migrating {system} to {target_platform}?
description: Gather costs and benefits then compute ratio

template: How many building blocks in {domain} are reused across more than one project?
description: Retrieve building blocks then compute reuse percentage

template: What is the compliance score of {system} against {standard} and what are the top violations?
description: Fetch system details and standard requirements then check compliance

template: Calculate the migration complexity score for moving {source_system} to {target_system}.
description: Retrieve both system states then compute complexity

template: What is the architecture quality score for the {domain} domain based on modularity and reusability?
description: Retrieve architecture and compute quality score

template: Determine the capacity planning horizon for {system} given current growth rate of {rate}%.
description: Retrieve utilization data then compute capacity projection

template: What is the technical debt principal for {system} and what is the estimated remediation cost?
description: Retrieve system state then compute debt assessment

template: Compute the interoperability score between {system_a} and {system_b}.
description: Retrieve both systems then compute interoperability matrix

template: Which ADM phase deliverable has the most dependencies and what is its completeness score?
description: Retrieve deliverables and dependencies then analyze

template: What percentage of {domain} capabilities are below maturity level 3?
description: Retrieve capability assessments then compute percentage

template: Calculate the ROI for implementing {building_block} across {count} projects.
description: Retrieve block costs and project benefits then compute ROI

template: What is the average maturity score across all capabilities in {domain}?
description: Retrieve all maturity scores then compute average

template: Determine the SLA compliance margin for {system} against {requirements}.
description: Retrieve system metrics and SLA requirements then validate

template: What is the transformation readiness score for {organization} given the proposed {changes}?
description: Retrieve organization profile then assess readiness

template: Calculate the weighted architecture decision score for {alternatives} given {criteria}.
description: Retrieve alternative details then compute weighted scores

template: What is the heat map classification for {capability}: invest, tolerate, migrate, or eliminate?
description: Retrieve capability metrics then compute heat map position

template: Compute the data flow throughput bottleneck between {system_a} and {system_b}.
description: Retrieve integration details then analyze data flow

template: What is the estimated payback period for the {initiative} initiative?
description: Retrieve cost/benefit projections then compute payback

template: Score the dependency coupling between {system_a} and {system_b} in the {domain} domain.
description: Retrieve relationships then compute coupling metric

template: What is the gap severity distribution for the {domain} architecture domain?
description: Retrieve baseline and target states then analyze gap distribution

template: Calculate the portfolio health score for applications in the {domain} domain.
description: Retrieve application portfolio then compute health score

template: What is the standards compliance percentage for {domain} technology components?
description: Retrieve components and standards then check compliance

template: Determine the architecture fitness score for the proposed {solution} solution.
description: Retrieve architecture details then compute fitness score

template: Among all building blocks that serve {service}, find which one has status 'approved' and supports {standard}.
description: Multi-hop search through BBs with service and standard filters

template: Find all stakeholders whose concerns include {concern} and who are impacted by changes in Phase {phase}.
description: Stakeholder search with concern and phase cross-reference

template: Which ArchiMate elements in the {layer} layer have relationships to elements being eliminated in the gap analysis?
description: Cross-reference ArchiMate elements with gap analysis results

template: Find all architecture decisions that reference {standard} and were approved in the last {period}.
description: Governance log search with standard and time filters

template: Which capabilities in {domain} are supported by building blocks with status 'proposed' but not yet 'approved'?
description: Capability to BB status chain query

template: Find all systems that have interfaces with {system} AND are classified as 'migrate' in the application portfolio.
Which data entities flowing between {system_a} and {system_b} have classification 'restricted'?
Find all technology standards in the {domain} domain that are both 'deprecated' and still used by active applications.
Which Phase {phase} deliverables reference principles from the {category} principle category?
Find all dispensations granted for {project} that affect {standard} compliance.
Which ArchiMate viewpoints show elements from both the {layer_a} and {layer_b} layers?
Find the longest dependency chain starting from {system} through all serving relationships.

description: Reference model to capability maturity chain

template: Find all work packages in the roadmap that depend on building blocks with unresolved compliance violations.
description: Roadmap to BB to compliance chain

template: Which patterns from the pattern library are applicable to {system} based on its current architecture?
description: Pattern matching based on system architecture

template: Find all services in the value stream that are realized by applications classified as 'eliminate'.
description: Value stream to application portfolio chain

template: Which stakeholders have concerns that are not addressed by any deliverable in Phase {phase}?
description: Stakeholder concern to deliverable coverage gap

template: Find all interfaces between systems where one is in the 'invest' and the other in 'migrate' TIME category.
Which ArchiMate elements are both a target of 'realization' from {element_a} and a source of 'serving' to {element_b}?
Find all transition architectures that include building blocks not yet approved by the architecture board.
description: Transition architecture to BB to board decision chain

template: Which compliance requirements from {standard_a} overlap with requirements from {standard_b}?
Find all contracts that reference systems with risk scores above {threshold}.
description: Contract to system to risk chain

template: Which capabilities in the business capability model have no supporting building blocks defined?
Find all architecture board decisions that impact Phase {phase} deliverables and have status 'deferred'.
description: Board decision to phase impact chain

template: Which data entities are master data but have no defined data quality metrics?
description: Data catalog to quality metrics gap

template: Compare the {ref_model_a} and {ref_model_b} reference models and recommend which better fits {use_case}.
description: Retrieve two reference models then compare and decide

template: Compare two architecture alternatives for {system}: {option_a} vs {option_b}. Which has better cost-benefit?
description: Retrieve alternatives then compare across dimensions

template: Should {system} be classified as Tolerate, Invest, Migrate, or Eliminate? Compare against criteria.
description: Retrieve system state and criteria then classify

template: Compare the compliance posture of {system_a} vs {system_b} against {standard}. Which needs more remediation?
Evaluate whether {pattern_a} or {pattern_b} is more suitable for {use_case} based on quality attributes.

description: Evaluate migration strategies based on dependencies

template: Compare the maturity levels of {capability_a} and {capability_b} and recommend which to invest in first.
Should {building_block} be built in-house or procured? Compare based on cost, time, and strategic fit.

Evaluate whether to extend {existing_system} or replace with {new_system} based on TCO and risk.

Identify integration gaps when adding {new_system} to the existing {domain} ecosystem.

Verify the architecture contract for {project} against the actual implementation state.

Assess the impact of {decision} on each stakeholder group and recommend mitigation.

For {system}: (1) identify all SOX violations, (2) determine in which roadmap wave they get remediated, (3) check if the payback period fits within Waves 1+2, (4) identify which approved SBB addresses the gap.
description: Complex: compliance + roadmap + cost-benefit + building block cross-analysis

template: For {domain} modernization: (1) compute gaps between current and target, (2) rank by risk score, (3) map to stakeholder concerns, (4) generate a prioritized roadmap.
description: Complex: gap analysis + risk + stakeholder + roadmap

template: Assess the {system} migration: (1) current state and dependencies, (2) compliance gaps against {standard_a} and {standard_b}, (3) cost-benefit with risk adjustment, (4) recommend migration wave placement.
description: Complex: state assessment + compliance + cost-benefit + roadmap

template: For the {initiative} initiative: (1) identify all affected stakeholders and their concerns, (2) map concerns to architecture gaps, (3) compute remediation costs, (4) generate communication plan.
Evaluate {building_block}: (1) which capabilities it supports, (2) compliance status, (3) reuse potential across domains, (4) cost-benefit of standardizing it.

For {domain} platform: (1) assess current maturity across all capabilities, (2) identify capabilities below threshold, (3) compute gap analysis for each, (4) generate migration roadmap with cost estimates.

Architecture review for {project}: (1) verify deliverable completeness for Phase {phase}, (2) check compliance against architecture principles, (3) assess stakeholder concern coverage, (4) identify risks.
Technology refresh analysis for {domain}: (1) inventory all technology components with age, (2) assess against technology radar, (3) compute technical debt, (4) generate refresh roadmap.
Vendor evaluation for {abb}: (1) list candidate SBBs, (2) check compliance for each, (3) compute TCO comparison, (4) assess vendor lock-in risk for each.
description: Complex: SBB listing + compliance + cost + risk

template: End-to-end {initiative} assessment: (1) transformation readiness, (2) cross-domain gap analysis, (3) stakeholder impact assessment, (4) detailed cost-benefit with NPV/IRR, (5) phased roadmap.
description: Complex: readiness + gaps + stakeholders + cost-benefit + roadmap

template: Data governance assessment for {domain}: (1) catalog all data entities, (2) check classification compliance, (3) identify data quality gaps, (4) compute remediation priority based on business impact.
description: Complex: data catalog + compliance + quality + prioritization

template: Integration architecture review for {system}: (1) map all interfaces and data flows, (2) analyze bottlenecks and security gaps, (3) check API standards compliance, (4) recommend target architecture.
description: Complex: interface mapping + analysis + compliance + recommendation

template: Cloud migration assessment for {system}: (1) current state with dependencies, (2) workload analysis and cloud readiness, (3) compliance check for cloud deployment, (4) cost comparison on-prem vs cloud, (5) migration roadmap.
description: Complex: state + readiness + compliance + cost + roadmap

template: Security architecture assessment for {domain}: (1) identify all sensitive data flows, (2) map security controls, (3) check compliance against {security_standard}, (4) compute risk scores, (5) prioritize remediation.
description: Complex: data flow + controls + compliance + risk + priority

template: Portfolio rationalization for {domain}: (1) inventory all applications with metrics, (2) compute TIME classification, (3) identify consolidation opportunities, (4) compute savings from rationalization, (5) generate transition roadmap.
description: Complex: inventory + classification + consolidation + savings + roadmap

template: Architecture principle compliance audit: (1) retrieve all principles, (2) check each domain for adherence, (3) identify all violations with severity, (4) compute remediation effort and cost.
description: Complex: principles + domain checks + violations + cost

template: Value stream optimization for {value_stream}: (1) map current stages and capabilities, (2) identify bottleneck stages, (3) gap analysis for each bottleneck, (4) compute improvement ROI.
description: Complex: value stream + bottleneck + gaps + ROI

template: M&A architecture due diligence for {company}: (1) assess technology landscape, (2) identify integration complexity, (3) compliance gap analysis, (4) estimate integration cost and timeline.
API strategy assessment for {domain}: (1) inventory current APIs, (2) compare against API design standards, (3) assess API maturity, (4) identify monetization opportunities, (5) generate API roadmap.
description: Complex: inventory + standards + maturity + monetization + roadmap

template: Operating model transformation for {organization}: (1) assess current team topology, (2) map capabilities to teams, (3) identify skill gaps, (4) design target operating model, (5) create transformation roadmap.
description: Complex: topology + capability mapping + skills + design + roadmap
